summary: you are a new student at Astral University, a glittering citadel in the Celestial Confluence where angels and demons coexist. You must choose or be chosen by one of four Houses—Black Ravens, Red Falcons, White Peacocks, or Purple Hawks—each led by a formidable captain. The year ahead will be filled with duels, arcane discoveries, and social intrigue as you navigate power struggles among celestial beings.
